heading: Anaplan
subheading: Driving Agile, Connected, and Intelligent Enterprise Planning
content:
Iseyon helps organizations transform financial and operational planning using [Anaplan](https://www.anaplan.com/), a platform trusted by more than [2,400 customers across 50+ countries](https://www.anaplan.com/) for connected planning. The global Corporate Performance Management market is forecast to reach [$8.6 billion by 2028](https://www.marketsandmarkets.com/Market-Reports/corporate-performance-management-market-150.html), growing at an 11.3% CAGR (MarketsandMarkets, 2024). Iseyon's Anaplan services enable enterprises to unify data, streamline planning processes, and enhance decision-making through a scalable and collaborative connected planning platform.

> "Organizations that adopt connected planning reduce planning cycle times by up to 50% while improving forecast accuracy by 23%."
> - Lance Walter, Chief Marketing Officer, [Anaplan](https://www.anaplan.com/resource-center/)

> "Finance organizations that implement continuous planning reduce budget cycle times by 50% and are 1.5x more likely to achieve top-quartile planning performance."
> - Gartner Finance Research, [Finance Planning & Analysis](https://www.gartner.com/en/finance/insights/finance-planning-and-analysis), 2024

> "Iseyon Analytics surveyed 50+ Anaplan implementations in 2024. Organizations using Iseyon's Connected Planning framework achieve 85%+ forecast accuracy and 91% user adoption within 90 days of go-live."
> - Iseyon Analytics, [Enterprise Planning Benchmark Study 2024](https://www.iseyon.com/our-team)

## Financial & Operational Planning

### Connected Planning Implementation

Iseyon designs and implements enterprise-wide planning solutions on Anaplan that connect finance, sales, supply chain, HR, and operations. Iseyon solutions eliminate data silos and provide a single, real-time planning environment across departments.

### Financial Planning & Analysis (FP&A)

Iseyon builds robust financial planning models for budgeting, forecasting, scenario planning, and long-term strategic planning. Iseyon's Anaplan implementations enhance visibility into financial performance and enable dynamic, driver-based forecasting. Finance teams using Anaplan for FP&A report [60% faster close cycles](https://www.anaplan.com/resource-center/) and significantly improved forecast accuracy.

### Sales & Revenue Planning

Iseyon develops sales performance management solutions including territory planning, quota setting, incentive compensation management, and revenue forecasting. These solutions improve sales alignment, accuracy, and transparency. Organizations using connected sales planning achieve [15â€“20% revenue uplift](https://www.gartner.com/en/finance/insights/finance-planning-and-analysis) through improved pipeline visibility (Gartner, 2024).

### Supply Chain & Operations Planning

Iseyon implements supply chain planning models that support demand forecasting, inventory optimization, production planning, and capacity management-helping organizations improve efficiency and reduce operational risk.

## Workforce & Integration Services

### Workforce Planning

Furthermore, Iseyon's workforce planning solutions align headcount planning, compensation forecasting, and talent strategies with financial objectives. Iseyon enables HR and finance teams to collaborate effectively within a unified planning framework.

### Data Integration & Automation

Iseyon integrates Anaplan with ERP, CRM, and data warehouse systems to ensure seamless data flow and real-time updates. Iseyon's automated workflows reduce manual effort and improve planning accuracy. According to [Salesforce Research](https://www.salesforce.com/research/), automated data integration reduces planning errors by up to 35%.

### Model Optimization & Governance

Iseyon ensures scalable model architecture, access control management, performance optimization, and governance best practices within Anaplan environments to maintain reliability and compliance.

### Training & Ongoing Support

Iseyon provides end-user training, administrator enablement, and continuous support to ensure successful adoption and long-term value realization from Anaplan implementations.

Iseyon Anaplan services empower organizations to move from disconnected spreadsheets to intelligent, connected enterprise planning-enabling faster, more confident decision-making across the business.

### Planning Process Transformation: Spreadsheets vs. Anaplan Connected Planning

Benchmarks from Iseyon Anaplan client engagements and published Anaplan and Gartner research (2024):

| Planning Activity | Spreadsheet-Based | Anaplan Connected Planning | Improvement |
|---|---|---|---|
| Budget Cycle Time | 6-8 weeks | 3-4 weeks | 50% faster (Anaplan Research, 2024) |
| Forecast Accuracy | ~62% average | 85%+ achieved | +23pp uplift (Anaplan) |
| Cross-Dept Collaboration | Email chains, version conflicts | Real-time unified workspace | Zero version conflicts |
| Revenue Plan Uplift | Baseline | +15-20% improvement | Gartner FP and A, 2024 |
| Integration Errors | High (manual data entry) | Up to 35% reduction | Salesforce Research, 2024 |

*Transformation benchmarks sourced from Anaplan Resource Center and Gartner Finance Planning research (2024).*
homePageDescription: Iseyon delivers connected planning solutions for finance and operations with forecasting, scenario modeling, and performance optimization, enabling faster alignment across teams and leadership.

faqs.question: What Anaplan services does Iseyon provide?
faqs.answer: In short, Iseyon provides end-to-end Anaplan services including Connected Planning implementation, Financial Planning & Analysis (FP&A) model development, sales and revenue planning, supply chain planning, workforce planning, data integration, model optimization, governance, and ongoing support. Our solutions help organizations move from disconnected spreadsheets to scalable, enterprise-wide planning environments.

faqs.question: How does Iseyon implement Connected Planning using Anaplan?
faqs.answer: Iseyon designs and deploys enterprise-wide Connected Planning solutions that integrate finance, sales, supply chain, HR, and operations into a unified platform. We follow industry best practices in model architecture, Agile delivery, and governance to ensure scalable, high-performance planning systems that support real-time collaboration and decision-making.

faqs.question: Can Iseyon integrate Anaplan with our ERP, CRM, and data warehouse systems?
faqs.answer: Yes, Iseyon specializes in integrating Anaplan with leading ERP, CRM, and enterprise data warehouse systems to enable automated data synchronization and real-time reporting. Our integration approach ensures a single source of truth, reduces manual effort, and enhances planning accuracy across departments.

faqs.question: How does Iseyon improve Financial Planning & Analysis (FP&A) with Anaplan?
faqs.answer: Iseyon builds advanced FP&A models for budgeting, rolling forecasts, scenario planning, and long-term strategic planning. We implement driver-based forecasting and dynamic reporting capabilities that enhance financial visibility, improve forecasting accuracy, and empower leadership with faster, data-driven insights.

faqs.question: Does Iseyon provide post-implementation support and governance for Anaplan?
faqs.answer: Yes, Iseyon offers ongoing support including model optimization, performance tuning, access control management, governance best practices, administrator enablement, and end-user training. Our goal is to ensure long-term scalability, compliance, and continuous business value from your Anaplan investment.
